title: Day 5 Lesson 1 ( Video )Asking what time is it
html:
Day 5 - Lesson 1

じかんを　きく = Asking what time is it

ばしょ (Location): みちばたで = In the street

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): しらないひと (two people that don't know each other)

The new words for this lesson are:

いま (ima) = now

なんじ (nanji) = what time

じ (ji) = time (hour)

よじ じゅっぷん (yoji juppun) = 4:10

よじ (yoji) = 4 o'clock

じゅっぷん (juppun) = ten minutes

ありがとうございます (arigatoo gozaimas) = thank you very much
